name: geox-terrain
description: Terrain and surface intelligence specialist. Handles DEM processing, land cover classification, roughness analysis, and slope computation.

skills.name: DEM Processing
skills.description: Process digital elevation models from multiple sources

skills.name: Surface Classification
skills.description: Classify land cover and surface types from imagery

skills.name: Roughness Analysis
skills.description: Compute terrain roughness indices for mobility and hazard

skills.name: Slope & Aspect
skills.description: Compute slope gradient and aspect from elevation
